front.title: A YANG Data Model for CMIS Access and Control

abstract.t: This document provides YANG data models for accessing and controlling CMIS in order to manage pluggable Digital Coherent Optics transceivers equipped in a router or a switch from outside the platform device. CMIS provides custom pages that can be defined by the module vendor for its own usage, allowing the capabilities of the optics devices to be extended. These YANG modules also allow the utilization of CMIS custom pages as a generic control mechanism.
